data.title: Anthony Scaramucci stood by Bitcoin despite business risks amid 2022 Crypto Winter, when BTC dropped from $69,000 to $16,000.
data.description: During a recent podcast, Anthony Scaramucci, CEO of SkyBridge Capital, highlighted his strong conviction in Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) despite facing challenges in his business. Scaramucci discussed the 2022 cryptocurrency winter when Bitcoin's value dropped significantly from $69,000 to $16,000, impacting his New York-based firm. He mentioned losing numerous clients and being depicted negatively in the New York Post. Despite the setbacks, Scaramucci remained optimistic about Bitcoin's potential. To read more about his reflections, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Weekly recap of 11 finance press releases, covering tariffs impact on holiday spending, PayPal's cybersecurity tips, and sports fan spending habits. NEW YORK, Oct. 17, 2025.
data.description: This week's top financial updates from PR Newswire in New York highlight the impact of tariffs on holiday shopping, cybersecurity advice from PayPal, and a study on the spending behaviors of sports enthusiasts. Released on October 17, 2025, these reports delve into pressing issues in the financial world. Notably, the discussion around tariffs is influencing consumer sentiment and could shape holiday spending patterns. Additionally, PayPal shared crucial cybersecurity tips to safeguard users against online threats. Moreover, an analysis of sports fans' spending habits sheds light on their purchasing preferences and trends. These releases offer valuable insights into current economic trends and consumer behaviors.

data.title: France intensifies scrutiny on Binance and others amid EU power struggle as ACPR audits dozens of exchanges to enforce MiCA regulations.
data.description: The French regulatory authority ACPR is conducting audits on Binance and several other exchanges as part of Paris' efforts to play a more significant role in enforcing MiCA regulations throughout Europe.

data.title: New global benchmark for healthy living announced at the 2025 Global Engineering Conference in Shanghai with over 250 attendees.
data.description: In Guangzhou, China, on October 17, 2025, the 2025 Global Engineering Conference and the inaugural World Green Design Conference commenced in Shanghai. The event brought together more than 250 retired senior UN officials, scholars from various nations, and industry representatives.

data.title: Positive CHMP opinion for Novartis' Scemblix in Europe for treating adults with newly diagnosed Ph+ CML-CP. Superior MMR rates, fewer adverse events, and possible faster, deeper, and lasting molecular responses. Scemblix could be a new standard of care in Europe after EC decision in two months.
data.description: Novartis received a positive opinion from the Committee for Medicinal Products for Human Use (CHMP) of EMA for Scemblix (asciminib) to treat adult patients with Philadelphia chromosome-positive chronic myeloid leukemia in chronic phase (Ph+ CML-CP) in all lines of treatment. The Phase III ASC4FIRST trial showed Scemblix's superior major molecular response rates compared to various tyrosine kinase inhibitors (TKIs), with fewer dose reductions and adverse events leading to discontinuation. This approval could provide a more selective and well-tolerated treatment option in several countries. Scemblix could establish a new standard of care in Europe, pending the European Commission's final decision in two months. The trial also demonstrated sustained superior MMR rates at week 96, meeting key secondary endpoints.

data.title: BingX, a top cryptocurrency exchange and Web3 AI firm, attains ISO 27001 certification for information security.
data.description: In Panama City on October 17, 2025, BingX, a prominent cryptocurrency exchange and Web3 AI firm, revealed that they have successfully obtained ISO/IEC 27001 certification. This certification signifies compliance with a globally acknowledged standard for information security management systems (ISMS).

data.title: RhythmX AI partners with Microsoft for personalized care through Dragon Copilot, boosting access & condition detection.
data.description: Cutting-edge precision care technology platform provides clinicians with instantaneous, clinically verified advanced intelligence in healthcare, enhancing accessibility and timely identification of potential conditions, resulting in immediate financial benefits. Located in PALO ALTO, Calif., the company RhythmX AI is at the forefront of utilizing artificial intelligence for medical purposes as of October 17, 2025.

data.title: Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC) released Q3 2025 results. Investors can join the earnings call today at 8 a.m. ET.
data.description: Today, in Charlotte, North Carolina, Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC) released its third quarter 2025 financial results. The company is offering investors the chance to participate in the live earnings call for this quarter at 8 a.m. ET. They can do so through a webcast or by dialing in. This provides an opportunity for investors to gain insights into the financial performance of the corporation.

data.title: Omio's report unveils travel trends for next 12 months, from World of Mouth to Generation Zealous. Published by leading booking platform.
data.description: Various travel trends and emerging traveler personas, such as 'World of Mouth', 'Beach Please', 'Travel Thrifties', and 'Generation Zealous', are expected to influence the upcoming year of travel. According to a report released by Omio, a prominent multi-modal booking platform based in Berlin, significant insights into travel habits and preferences for the next 12 months have been revealed. The report highlights the diversity in traveler types and trends that are projected to shape the future of travel, offering valuable insights into the evolving landscape of the travel industry.
